title: chrysosplenium rimosum
intro: Chrysosplenium rimosum, also known as Fragrant Wood Sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium rimosum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an expectorant to help ease respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of Chrysosplenium rimosum include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
